rationale: Table values for ListOffsets (0-5), OffsetFetch (0-5), FindCoordinator (0-2), JoinGroup (0-5), Heartbeat (0-3), LeaveGroup (0-3), SyncGroup (0-3), ApiVersions (0-2), CreateTopics (0-4), DeleteTopics (0-3) match SUPPORTED_APIS in src/protocol/mod.rs exactly. Backwards Compatibility section explicitly states the non-flexible-version policy.

findings.summary: Flexible-version note exists at line 145 but does not include an explicit cross-reference link to src/protocol/mod.rs SUPPORTED_APIS comment as suggested in the bead description (acceptance criteria do not require it).
